retry_reason: A NULL return means the target has no associated device; retrying without any state change will not help.
contract_summary: This function acquires a reference on the sas_device associated with a target. It must be called with sas_device_lock held. Returns the device with an incremented reference count, or NULL if no device is associated. Caller must release the reference via sas_device_put when done. The function is a simple get-wrapper ensuring proper reference counting under lock.
